chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-769 of 2020. 1. For Orders on CMA No. 8004/2020. 2. For Orders on CMA No. 8005/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For Orders on MA No. 8006/2020. 28-12-2020. Mr. Waheed Ali Samtio advocate for the applicant. >>>>>...<<<<< 1. Application for urgent hearing is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3 & 4. It is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that deteneue is illegally confined by the private respondents within the jurisdiction of PS Gambat. No cogent reason has been advanced by the applicant for approaching this Court directly. Office is directed to transmit the instant Crl. Misc. Application to learned District & Sessions Judge Khairpur for its disposal in accordance with law, personally. Judge Nasim/P.A
